title: Analyzer Relation Graph Row
$comment: Schema v1.1 (2026-06-29). Additive bump: the new v2 analyzer emits new predicate values (`instantiates`, `calls`, `extends`, `references`, `implements`, `type_of`, `returns`, `overrides`, `decorates`, `exports`) and a new optional evidence field `included_first_substantive_line` on `imports_or_includes` edges. v1 records remain valid; this schema does not enum-constrain `predicate`, and the new evidence field is optional. v1 predicates kept verbatim: `defines`, `imports_or_includes`, `doc_mentions_entity`, `contains`. The v1 alias `imports_or_includes` is the v2 emitter's output for CodeGraph's `imports` edge kind, preserving the existing prepare_module_inputs.py filter.
